title: Add Clickable Open Report/Dashboard Link in Details Pane
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing the details pane, I want a clickable link with the Salesforce icon to open the report or dashboard directly in Salesforce in a new tab.
description: Feature: Add a clickable link in the details pane (in front of Notes) that shows the report/dashboard name with the Salesforce icon. Both the icon and the report name are clickable and open the actual report/dashboard in Salesforce in a new tab. This provides quick access to the source record without leaving the details pane.
acceptance_criteria: Report/dashboard name appears as a clickable link in the details pane
Salesforce icon is displayed next to the link
Both icon and text are clickable
Link opens the Salesforce report/dashboard in a new browser tab
ux_changes: Added a clickable Salesforce link with icon in the details pane that opens the report/dashboard in a new tab.
implementation_notes: The link is constructed using the Salesforce instance URL and the report/dashboard ID. Both icon and text elements have click handlers opening the URL in a new tab.
comment_summary: Waqar added the link and asked for review. Screenshot shows the link placement in the details pane.
